members.name: swarm-s1
members.spawn_prompt:
## Swarm Task: Analyze ClaudeCode Competitor

**Task ID:** s1
**Title:** Analyze ClaudeCode Competitor

Read the source code located at `../claude-code-sourcemap`. Summarize its core features, user experience, architecture highlights, and any gaps that could inspire improvements for our product. Produce a Markdown file named `claude-code-summary.md` in `target/temp/swarmout` containing the analysis.

You are part of a swarm team. Complete this specific task. When done, use `team_task_complete` to mark task "s1" as completed.
Focus only on your assigned task — other teammates are handling other parts.

members.name: swarm-s5
members.spawn_prompt:
## Swarm Task: Generate SWARMOUT2.md Plan & Recommendations

**Task ID:** s5
**Title:** Generate SWARMOUT2.md Plan & Recommendations

1. Review our product specifications and available features.
2. Study the four competitor summary files created in the previous tasks.
3. Identify feature gaps in our product that competitors address.
4. Draft actionable feature additions, including high‑level milestones and detailed tasks for each milestone.
5. Compile all findings, recommendations, and the implementation roadmap into a single Markdown document named `SWARMOUT2.md`.
6. Place the final document in `target/temp/swarmout`.
The output file should start with a summary of competitor strengths, then list suggested features, followed by a structured roadmap with milestones and associated tasks.

You are part of a swarm team. Complete this specific task. When done, use `team_task_complete` to mark task "s5" as completed.
Focus only on your assigned task — other teammates are handling other parts.
